item.text: 我会按要求运行该命令，并简要说明输出结果。

item.aggregated_output:
cat : Cannot find path 'D:\this\file\definitely\does\not\exist\xyz123.txt' because it does not exist.
At line:2 char:1
+ cat /this/file/definitely/does/not/exist/xyz123.txt
+ ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    + CategoryInfo          : ObjectNotFound: (D:\this\file\de...xist\xyz123.txt:String) [Get-Content], ItemNotFoundEx 
   ception
    + FullyQualifiedErrorId : PathNotFound,Microsoft.PowerShell.Commands.GetContentCommand

item.text:
命令执行失败，退出码 `1`。

结果是文件不存在：`D:\this\file\definitely\does\not\exist\xyz123.txt`，PowerShell 报错 `Cannot find path ... because it does not exist.`
